title: downingia humilis
intro: Downingia humilis, also known as the tumbling stars or western downingia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Downingia humilis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing and soothe digestive issues.
